title: oldenlandia affinis
intro: Oldenlandia affinis is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the madder family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Oldenlandia affinis include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine.
